name: Steak and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bottom round steak, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the kidney beans in cold water overnight. Rinse and drain them twice until they are quite dry.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a soup pot over medium heat. Add the steak cubes and brown them on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
3. Remove the steak from the pot and set aside. Reduce the heat to low.
4. Add the onion, celery, carrot, and garlic to the pot. Sauté until the vegetables are softened and lightly caramelized, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Return the browned steak to the pot. Stir in the beef stock (or broth) and add the kidney beans and pinto beans. Bring the mixture to a simmer over low heat.
6. Simmer for 45 minutes or until the beans are tender. Season with Tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir in the tomato paste and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
